name: Mother's Chess Cakes (Christmas)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Make the pie pastry and line small muffin tins with pastry rounds cut to fit. Alternatively, make the crust using: 1/4 lb. butter, 3 oz. cream cheese, and 1 cup sifted flour. Mix together and press into the muffin tins.
3. Spoon 1 tsp of filling into the unbaked pastry-lined muffin tins.
4. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20 minutes.
5. Run a knife around the tart edges to loosen.
6. Remove from the oven and transfer to wire racks to cool.
7. Store in the tin box between layers of wax paper.
